StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT TOP 10 l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue, o_orderdate, o_shippriority FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey WHERE c_mktsegment = 'MACHINERY' AND o_orderdate < '1995-03-15' AND l_shipdate > '1995-03-15' GROUP BY l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority ORDER BY revenue DESC, o_orderdate
